{{Quote|You're fat, he's fatter. Maybe you can outrun him before he eats you. Oh yeah, watch out for its…long tongue.|Boba Fett, about to a captive about the globblin|<ref name="Outbid But Never Outgunned">{{Tales|7|Outbid But Never Outgunned}}</ref>}}
'''Globblins''' were carnivores creatures with green skin and four-clawed [[Limb/Legends|limbs]]. They had sharp, white [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] and a jutting lower jaw. Their [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], located on the sides of their head, glowed blue. They appeared to be capable of mimicking speech, as one was witnessed saying, "Feed me". While these predators were not very fast in terms of running, they did have a means of capturing their prey without usage of their legs: a long, prehensile tongue. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] once used a globblin to intimidate a captive into providing the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] with a sought-after possession.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|7|Outbid But Never Outgunned}} {{1st}}
